summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Restaurant Dashboard app with JWT authentication, JSON import, and multi-tenancy features. All 42 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend testing confirms all requested features working correctly including login flow, Import JSON button/dialog, QR code generation, and category sidebar.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login with admin/220066 returns access_token, user, restaurants
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with invalid credentials returns 401
Backend: GET /api/auth/me with Bearer token returns user info and restaurants
Backend: GET /api/auth/me without token returns 401
Backend: GET /api/restaurants with auth returns restaurant list
Backend: GET /api/restaurants/{id}/categories with auth returns categories
Backend: POST /api/restaurants/{id}/categories creates category
Backend: PUT /api/restaurants/{id}/categories/{cat_id} updates category
Backend: DELETE /api/restaurants/{id}/categories/{cat_id} deletes category
Backend: GET /api/restaurants/{id}/menu-items with auth returns items
Backend: POST /api/restaurants/{id}/menu-items creates item
Backend: PUT /api/restaurants/{id}/menu-items/{item_id} updates item
Backend: DELETE /api/restaurants/{id}/menu-items/{item_id} deletes item
Backend: POST /api/restaurants/{id}/import-menu imports categories and items from JSON
Backend: POST /api/restaurants/{id}/import-menu with multiple categories works
Backend: POST /api/restaurants/{id}/import-menu without auth returns 401
Backend: GET /api/restaurants/{id}/tables returns tables list
Backend: GET /api/restaurants/{id}/tables/{id}/qr returns QR code data
Backend: GET /api/restaurants/{id}/analytics returns analytics data
Backend: GET /api/restaurants/{id}/menu-sections returns sections (Еда, Напитки, Кальяны)
Backend: POST/PUT/DELETE menu-sections CRUD works
Backend: GET /api/restaurants/{id}/call-types returns call types
Backend: POST/DELETE call-types CRUD works
Backend: GET /api/restaurants/{id}/settings returns settings with BYN currency
Backend: PUT /api/restaurants/{id}/settings updates telegram settings
Backend: POST /api/upload accepts valid images
Backend: POST /api/upload rejects invalid file types
Backend: GET /api/public/menu/{table_code} returns menu without auth
Backend: POST /api/public/staff-calls creates staff call without auth
Frontend: Login page loads with username/password fields and submit button
Frontend: Login with admin/220066 redirects to admin panel
Frontend: Menu page shows 'Импорт JSON' button in header
Frontend: Import JSON button triggers file picker
Frontend: Import JSON dialog opens when JSON file selected
Frontend: Import JSON dialog has textarea with JSON content
Frontend: Import JSON submit creates categories and items
Frontend: Categories sidebar shows category names without truncation
Frontend: Settings page Tables tab shows tables list
Frontend: QR button has 'QR' text label (not just icon)
Frontend: QR dialog opens with QR code image and download button
Frontend: Multi-tenancy - restaurant switcher in sidebar works
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up during testing. Import test created 'Playwright Test Category' which was successfully verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from the request are working: JWT authentication (login, /me endpoints), JSON import (POST /api/restaurants/{id}/import-menu), multi-tenancy with restaurant_id prefix on all endpoints, QR code generation, image upload. Frontend Import JSON button triggers file picker -> opens dialog with textarea -> imports data. QR buttons in Settings->Tables have 'QR' text label. Category names in sidebar have whiteSpace:normal CSS so they wrap instead of truncating.

jwt_authentication.response: Returns access_token, user (id, username, role, restaurant_ids), restaurants array

json_import.frontend_flow: Импорт JSON button -> file picker -> dialog with textarea -> import

qr_code_with_text.dialog: Shows QR code, table info, menu URL, download button

category_name_wrapping.css: whiteSpace: normal, textOverflow: clip, overflow: visible
category_name_wrapping.behavior: Long names wrap to multiple lines instead of truncating
